title: peucedanum jaeschkeanum
intro: Peucedanum jaeschkeanum, also known as Chinese masterwort, is a plant species in the carrot family, native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Peucedanum jaeschkeanum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Peucedanum jaeschkeanum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
